name: The Rat Patrol
overview: The exploits of four Allied soldiers — three Americans and one Englishman — who are part of a long-range desert patrol group in the North African campaign during World War II. Their mission: "to attack, harass and wreak havoc on Field Marshal Rommel's vaunted Afrika Korps".

trailers.title: 1967-68 Television Season 50th Anniversary: The Rat Patrol (series promo)
